resources.string: Choose a unique username that people will use to find and recognize you on Oris.
Create a strong password to protect your account.
Use an active email address to verify your account and recover access when needed.
Use between 3 and 20 characters for your username
Use 9+ characters, at least one digit and one uppercase letter
An account with that email or username already exists
Password must be at least 9 characters and include one digit and one uppercase letter
This is not a valid email
The username must be between 3 and 20 characters
